title: Sarepta Therapeutics Q2 2024 Earnings Call Summary - ELEVIDYS Label Expansion and Strong Performance
text:
Sarepta achieved net product revenue of approximately $361 million in Q2 2024, a 51% increase over the same quarter last year. Total Q2 2024 revenue was $362.9 million, up from $261.2 million in Q2 2023.

Product-Specific Revenue: ELEVIDYS: $121.7 million in Q2 2024. EXONDYS 51: $129.8 million. VYONDYS 53: $31.6 million. AMONDYS 45: $7.4 million. PMO franchise total: $238.8 million.

Key Milestone: ELEVIDYS received broad FDA approval in June 2024, making it available to over 80% of Duchenne patients in the U.S. Following the June 2024 FDA approval expanding ELEVIDYS eligibility, management reported robust early demand signals. The company expects modest growth in Q3 2024, followed by approximately double-digit growth in Q4 2024.

Commercial Metrics: Processed over 1,000 antibody screening kit requests within weeks of label expansion. Enrollment forms exceeded internal expectations. 75% of treatment sites have already dosed patients under the expanded label.

2025 Guidance: The company projects net product revenue between $2.9 billion and $3.1 billion across all four approved therapies, reflecting confidence in the ELEVIDYS launch expansion.

Financial Milestone: Company became cash flow positive for the first time in company history during Q2.
